description_long: This lantern features a tall, rectangular metal post supporting a square lantern housing with a slightly overhanging, flat metallic roof. The lantern section has two prominent, frosted glass panels on each visible side, framed by metallic borders, suggesting a modern, utilitarian design. A single, thin vertical rod extends from the top of the roof, likely serving as a lightning rod or antenna. The structure is predominantly metallic gray, with the glass panels emitting a soft, yellowish glow, indicating illumination. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. Its robust construction and height make it suitable for outdoor urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots.
description: A tall, modern lantern with a square metal post, frosted glass panels, and a flat metallic roof, topped by a thin vertical rod. The design is minimalistic and functional, ideal for urban outdoor lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing two frosted glass panels and the vertical rod positioned slightly to the right on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view with the same glass panels visible, but the rod appears more centered due to the angle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the rod now on the left side of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the rod again appearing more centered from this perspective.
